title: Accessing form shareable link from API
excerpt:
Greetings all :slight_smile: 
Is that possible to get the shareable link of the form view of a board ? Otherwise, it’d be much appreciated :slight_smile: 
Thank you !

posts.author: bsecure (Benjamin NABET)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings all

Is that possible to get the shareable link of the form view of a board ? Otherwise, it’d be much appreciated

Thank you !

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bsecure - welcome!

Right now there isn’t a way to access the forms’ shareable link through the API - but I can totally see how that would come in handy. I’ve gone ahead and added it to our product roadmap - while I can’t promise it will be done tomorrow, rest assured it’s on our radar.

-Danny

posts.author: reclaim (Susie )
posts.cookedHtml: Was there any resolution on the roadmap for this issue? Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @reclaim!

As of today this feature has not been implemented.

Any changes like this one will be posted in our changelog

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Patrick (patrick@parvenunext.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is there an ETA on this yet? Super needed

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Patrick !

We do not have an ETA on this, but if it is implemented, we will announce it!

Cheers,
Matias
